info.english_meaning: to irrigate to wet to sprinkle to urinate
info.hindI_arTa: sIMcanA gIlA karanAprokzaRa karanA peSAba karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'rajaH pramehAnnArIRAM mAsi mAsi viSuDyati sarvaM SarIraM dozASca na pramehantyataH striyaH' (mADava0 3336 ityatra maDukoSavyAKyAnAmudDftam) prameharogeRa na grasyanta ityAha
'striyaM dAsImaDimehayatAM pUrvaH sAhasadaRqaH' (kO0 a0 23641) aDimehayatAmaDicaratAmanAryaM vyavaharatAm mETunyamAcaratAm
'devI devayajanI sA dIkzitena nABimihyA' (=nABimehyA) (Sa0 brA0 32220) tasyA upari dIkzito na mehet na mUtrayet
